description: A geotechnical engineer monitors instrumentation on a tailings storage facility (TSF) to ensure its stability.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve real-time data from the piezometers within the tailings dam, which measure water pressure.

expected_outcome.value: A trend chart of pore water pressure is displayed.

nodes.task_description: Compare the current water pressure levels against the design limits and alarm thresholds.

expected_outcome.value: The analysis shows that pressure in one area is approaching the alarm level.

nodes.task_description: Create a notification for the operations team to increase pumping from the decant pond to lower the phreatic surface within the dam.

expected_outcome.value: An instruction is sent to operations to take action to lower the water level.
